title: Novel Heights
description: Explore the vast islands and sky village that lurk above. Be careful not to fall there may not be a way back.
body: Explore the never-ending void of islands, skulk, and villages! Keep in mind, there is no stronghold. To get to the end, you must fight the Warden boss and craft the end portal frames using the wardencore! Once the warden has been defeated, you will obtain the wardencore. Move around your island in new ways, use the glider to glide around the void, and use the rope to travel up and down to the other islands and villages! This modpack is a fun and exciting new challenge for skilled players and casuals who might want to try something new.
